# 获取公众号的预估活跃粉丝、头条平均阅读、头条平均点赞、周发文量、最新发文时间、极致了指数

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/Keyverifycode:
    post:
      summary: 获取公众号的预估活跃粉丝、头条平均阅读、头条平均点赞、周发文量、最新发文时间、极致了指数
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        **库里面数据，非实时数据**

        |                 状态码                 |                       
        说明                         |

        |:-----------------------------------:|:-------------------------------------------------:|

        | {"message":"Internal Server Error"} |                  
        网络错误，请重试1~3次                    |

        |                  0                  |                       
        成功                         |

        |                 -1                  |            
        QPS超过上限，不得高于5次/秒，请5秒后再试！              |

        |                 104                 |                 
        短连接文章已被删除或文章被迁移                  |

        |                 106                 |              
        获取阅读点赞数频率过快，请暂停2秒后重试!               |

        |                 400                 |         短链接转化失败，建议先调用 短链接转长链接
        转化为长链接后继续调用         |

        |                10002                |                   
        key或附加码不正确                     |

        |                20001                |                    
        金额不足，请充值                      |

        |                20002                |                   
        请输入正确的微信链接                     |

        |                20003                | 文章链接有误，请检查文章链接url中的&是否已经编码为%26  
        \|50000\|内部服务器错误 |



        ### 返回结果

        | 字段 | 说明 |

        | --- | --- |

        | ['data']['name'] | 公众号名称 |

        | ['data']['ghid'] | 公众号的原始id |

        | ['data']['wxid'] | 公众号的微信id |

        | ['data']['avatar'] | 公众号头像 |

        | ['data']['qrcode'] | 公众号二维码 |

        | ['data']['fans'] | 预计粉丝数 |

        | ['data']['avg_top_read'] | 头条平均阅读 |

        | ['data']['avg_top_zan'] |  头条平均点赞 |

        | ['data']['week_articles'] | 周发文量 |

        | ['data']['latest_publish_time'] |  最新发文时间 |

        | ['data']['jzl_index'] | 极致了指数 |
      tags:
        - 公众号账号搜索和账号基本信息
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                url:
                  type: string
                  description: '文章长链接(0.5元/次)  丨文章短链接(0.52元/次) '
                name:
                  type: string
                  description: 公众号名称 | 原始id |wxid (0.52元/次)
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了官网 key
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 附加码 (如设置了附加码verifycode，则此参数为必选，如未设置则为非必选)
              x-apifox-orders:
                - url
                - name
                - key
                - verifycode
              required:
                - url
                - name
                - key
                - verifycode
            example:
              url: ''
              name: 人民日报
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  msg:
                    type: string
                  data:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      name:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号名称
                      ghid:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号的原始id
                      wxid:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号的微信id
                      avatar:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号头像
                      qrcode:
                        type: string
                        description: 公众号二维码
                      fans:
                        type: integer
                        description: 预计粉丝数
                      avg_top_read:
                        type: integer
                        description: 头条平均阅读
                      avg_top_zan:
                        type: integer
                        description: ' 头条平均点赞'
                      week_articles:
                        type: integer
                        description: 周发文量
                      latest_publish_time:
                        type: string
                        description: ' 最新发文时间'
                      jzl_index:
                        type: number
                        description: 极致了指数
                    required:
                      - name
                      - ghid
                      - wxid
                      - avatar
                      - qrcode
                      - fans
                      - avg_top_read
                      - avg_top_zan
                      - week_articles
                      - latest_publish_time
                      - jzl_index
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - name
                      - ghid
                      - wxid
                      - avatar
                      - qrcode
                      - fans
                      - avg_top_read
                      - avg_top_zan
                      - week_articles
                      - latest_publish_time
                      - jzl_index
                required:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - msg
                  - data
              example:
                code: 0
                msg: 成功
                data:
                  name: 人民日报
                  ghid: gh_363b924965e9
                  wxid: rmrbwx
                  avatar: >-
                    https://wx.qlogo.cn/mmhead/Q3auHgzwzM5Dlw4H8vWoicXPXccEVkWYgrmSiavKwjaTkYuqswgXicqhA/0
                  qrcode: https://open.weixin.qq.com/qr/code?username=rmrbwx
                  fans: 55732800
                  avg_top_read: 100001
                  avg_top_zan: 10234
                  week_articles: 58
                  latest_publish_time: '2024-07-31 13:03:03'
                  jzl_index: 6157.23
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 公众号账号搜索和账号基本信息
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-199761469-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
